mapper.sql: id, name, subtitle, slot, CAST(tags AS CHAR) AS tagsJson, sort_order AS sortOrder, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
attachment_id AS attachmentId, definition_id AS definitionId, effect_type AS effectType, level
attachment_id AS ownerId, weapon_id AS value
attachment_id AS ownerId, generation AS value
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM attachments ORDER BY sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM attachments WHERE id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC

SELECT
FROM attachment_effects ORDER BY attachment_id ASC, effect_type ASC, level DESC, definition_id ASC

SELECT
FROM attachment_effects WHERE attachment_id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY attachment_id ASC, effect_type ASC, level DESC, definition_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachments WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM build_items WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attachments ( id, name, subtitle, slot, tags, sort_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{slot}, #{tagsJson}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), subtitle = VALUES(subtitle), slot = VALUES(slot), tags = VALUES(tags), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
INSERT IGNORE INTO attachment_weapons (attachment_id, weapon_id) VALUES (#{attachmentId}, #{weaponId})

INSERT INTO attachment_effects (attachment_id, definition_id, effect_type, level) VALUES
(#{attachmentId}, #{effect.definitionId}, #{effect.effectType}, #{effect.level})
